title: DTC Read and Clear — All Modules
description: Read diagnostic trouble codes from all vehicle ECUs and clear codes after repair confirmation. Foundation capability for all diagnostic workflows.
physical_solution: Retrieve all stored DTCs from every ECU. Diagnose root cause. Repair. Clear codes. Verify non-return.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — powertrain/emissions modules fully accessible. Full multi-module sweep limited by ELM addressing on some OEMs. Gateway routing affects body/chassis modules.

procedure_steps.description: Broadcast DTC read request: $19 02 [STATUS_MASK]. Read all stored/pending DTCs across all modules.
Record all DTCs with freeze frame data. Do not clear until root cause is identified and repaired.
Diagnose and repair root cause. Verify repair is complete.
Clear all DTCs: $14 FF FF FF (clear all groups). Or target specific group by DTC group identifier.
Re-read DTCs: $19 02 FF. Confirm all codes cleared. Complete drive cycle if needed for monitors to run.
Verify no DTCs return after drive cycle.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Standard UDS $19/$14. Multi-module via functional addressing (0x7DF). Toyota-specific PIDs for enhanced data.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: F-CAN modules respond well. Body modules (B-CAN) may need gateway routing. HDS provides full sweep.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: CONSULT-III+ provides full scan. ELM327 good for powertrain; body modules may need enhanced addressing.
oem_notes.Ford: HS-CAN for powertrain. MS-CAN body modules on pins 3/11 — standard ELM may miss these.
oem_notes.GM: HS-CAN powertrain accessible. SW-CAN (pin 1) body modules need specialized adapter.
oem_notes.BMW: ZGW routes diagnostic requests. $19 works broadly. G-series may limit full sweep without ISTA.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: J533 gateway routes all DTC requests. Full sweep requires addressing all module types.
oem_notes.Stellantis: CAN-C (powertrain) accessible. CAN-IHS body modules on pins 3/11. SGW limits some 2018+ modules.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Standard UDS $19/$14. Gateway restricts some 2019+ modules for write operations only — reads remain open.
